## Summary

## Tests

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated.
- [ ] Documentation updated.
- [ ] No unsafe suppression or automatic "not affected" conclusion.
- [ ] No live cloud calls, telemetry, ticketing automation, secrets scanning, malware scanning, or CNAPP inventory.
- [ ] Output escaping considered for scanner-controlled text.
- [ ] Scoring changes justified and covered by tests.
- [ ] Mapping or correlation behavior documented.
